paper_title: Seismic and Bathymetric Analysis of South China Sea

methods.description: This method involves conducting a bathymetric survey using a Kongsberg EM122 multibeam system to create a high-resolution seabed digital terrain model. The survey helps in identifying modern contourite features.

steps.description: Conduct the bathymetric survey using a Kongsberg EM122 multibeam system.
steps.searchable_summary: perform bathymetric survey with Kongsberg EM122

steps.description: Process the original multibeam sounding data using CARIS HIPS and SIPS software (version 8.1.9).
steps.searchable_summary: process multibeam data with CARIS HIPS and SIPS

steps.description: Build the final high-resolution seabed digital terrain model at a 100 m grid resolution using the swath angle surface method of CARIS HIPS and SIPS software.
steps.searchable_summary: create seabed digital terrain model at 100 m resolution

methods.description: This method involves collecting and processing seismic reflection profiles to identify contourite features and perform seismic stratigraphic analysis.

steps.description: Collect eight multichannel 2D seismic reflection profiles.
Process seismic data below the seabed using a standard pre-stack time-migration procedure.
steps.searchable_summary: apply pre-stack time-migration to seismic data

steps.description: Process seismic sections above the seabed including direct wave attenuation, amplitude recovery, high-pass filtering, and constant velocity stack.
steps.searchable_summary: process seismic sections with wave attenuation and filtering

methods.description: This method uses seismic data to perform stratigraphic analysis, identify contourite features, and interpret oceanographic structures.

steps.description: Execute a seismic stratigraphic analysis through a conceptual approach.
Identify large contourite features according to accepted criteria.
steps.searchable_summary: identify contourite features in seismic data

steps.description: Formulate an oceanographic interpretation of water mass structure following established methods.
steps.searchable_summary: interpret water mass structure from seismic data
